emergency_definition: we consider that an emergency. Same thing if the fire department has been out
they tell the customer to call us right away

emergency_routing_rules.raw: Our main issue is missed after-hours calls. Right now we forward everything to a single cell phone, and if that person is on another call, emergencies get missed. If a sprinkler is actively leaking or a head has been damaged, we consider that an emergency. Same thing if the fire department has been out and they tell the customer to call us right away.
steps: Our main issue is missed after-hours calls. Right now we forward everything to a single cell phone, and if that person is on another call, emergencies get missed.
If a sprinkler is actively leaking or a head has been damaged, we consider that an emergency. Same thing if the fire department has been out and they tell the customer to call us right away.

integration_constraints: We use ServiceTrade for all jobs. For now, Clara should not create jobs directly; just capture details so the office can create the job in the morning.
after_hours_flow_summary: Right now after hours we ask callers to leave a voicemail and then the tech on call checks it. Half the time they forget to leave a callback number. We want Clara to capture the name, callback number, and what’s going on, then try to reach the on-call tech.
